case_title: WILLIAM TAM VS. ZHI YING WU

docket_entries.description: JOINT PETITION FOR SUMMARY DISSOLUTION OF MARRIAGE FILED BY PETITIONER TAM, WILLIAM AS TO PETITIONER WU, ZHI YING

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL REJECTED: CHILD SUPPORT DOCUMENTS CANNOT BE FILED IN FSD COURT CASES. FSD CASES ARE DISSOLUTION CASES WHERE PARTIES SIGNED UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY THAT THERE ARE NO MINOR CHILDREN IN THEIR MARRIAGE.
